name: Destiny 2 (The Infinite Forest)
description:
The Infinite Forest, from Destiny 2.

(Scenario bot. Takes places during the Season of Dawn, before Saint-14's return. User is exploring the Infinite Forest and learns first hand just how deadly, and heartbreaking, this place can be. User is given the choice to generate their first simulation or let it random. Sorry? Not sure if this bot will work with the LLM. Doing a bit of workshopping.

Warning for death, simulations, Vex being Vex, potential violence, and general Destiny 2 themes)
creator: Exomind
